metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.0-beta.1
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Added Transfer for current files, waveform selections, and selected assets. - Added naming templates, WAV/FLAC, sample-rate and channel conversion. - Added fades, Peak/True Peak/LUFS-I normalization, and collision policies. - Applies current Pitch, Rate, Gain, Reverse, and Preserve Pitch. - Restores project selections, render settings, cursor, and time selection.
